name: chain_i_just_got_into_y_combinator
method: I just got into Y Combinator

stages.task: Scrape ycombinator.com/companies API for current and recent batch companies, extract name/domain/vertical/stage/founder info
Score each company by service-fit: do they need landing pages, cold email, content, dev? Filter to companies <6mo post-funding with no visible marketing infrastructure
Generate personalized cold outreach referencing their YC batch, specific product, and a concrete offer (landing page audit, cold email setup, etc). Feed into EAS pipeline
